## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Smoke checked key route(s)

## Risk checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, keys, or live credentials are committed
- [ ] Database migrations are forward-only and reviewed
- [ ] Auth, privacy, and user-data access paths were considered
- [ ] UI changes were checked at desktop and mobile widths
